rationale.hitl-workflow: human review/edit/approve gates at plan and code stages
rationale.survey-input: practitioner perceptions, benefits/challenges, adoption familiarity findings
rationale.adopted: deployed into production JIRA, 2,600 engineers, real PRs merged
rationale.agentic: AI-planned multi-step work delivered as PR-granularity artifact for gating
rationale.risk-quality: empirical defects, comprehensibility findings on generated code (Q5-Q8)
rationale.method-field-study: real-world deployment observed at Atlassian over two months
